affliction.description: A master of shadow magic who specializes in drains and damage-over-time spells. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Soul Harvester
left.description: Few grasp the power hidden within souls, but many know the hunger demons share for spirits of the fallen. Soul Harvesters enter pacts with demons from the Twisting Nether, serving as their host and feeding them the souls of their foes in exchange for incredible power.

right.name: Hellcaller
right.description: Amongst the satyr sects throughout Azeroth, Hellcallers are the most feared. Hellcaller warlocks have learned to weave together the vilest of shadow magic and entropic fel fire at the cost of corrupting their own soul.

nodes.name: Fel Domination
nodes.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

nodes.name: Soul Leech
nodes.description: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Burning Rush
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

nodes.name: Fel Pact
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Demon Skin
nodes.description:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.1% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

nodes.name: Fel Armor
nodes.description:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

nodes.name: Fiendish Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Demonic Embrace
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 10%.

choices.name: Nightmare
choices.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

choices.name: Horrify
choices.description: Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

nodes.name: Demonic Fortitude
nodes.description: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

nodes.name: Banish
nodes.description: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration, or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Curse of Exhaustion
nodes.description:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

nodes.name: Curse of Tongues
nodes.description:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

nodes.name: Infernal Beneficiary
nodes.description: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Mortal Coil
nodes.description: Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 sec and healing you for 20% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Pact of the Annihilan
nodes.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

nodes.name: Demonic Circle
nodes.description:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects.

You also learn:

 Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

nodes.name: Pact of the Satyr
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Improved Mortal Coil
nodes.description: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Dark Pact
nodes.description: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional 950 for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

nodes.name: Foul Mouth
nodes.description: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

nodes.name: Empowered Healthstone
nodes.description: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

nodes.name: Abyss Walker
nodes.description: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Fortified Soul
nodes.description: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
nodes.description:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

nodes.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
nodes.description: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

choices.name: Ichor of Devils
choices.description: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

choices.name: Frequent Donor
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Pact of the Eredar
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.name: Pact of the Nathrezim
nodes.description: Increases your Leech by 2%.

nodes.name: Demonic Resilience
nodes.description: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

nodes.name: Empowered Drain Life
nodes.description: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

choices.name: Strength of Will
choices.description: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

choices.name: Dark Accord
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

nodes.name: Demonic Gateway
nodes.description: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

choices.name: Howl of Terror
choices.description: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Shadowfury
choices.description: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Swift Artifice
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

nodes.name: Soul Link
nodes.description:
5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. 

While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Frequent Traveler
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

nodes.name: Fel Synergy
nodes.description: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

nodes.name: Oppressive Darkness
nodes.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

nodes.name: Pact of Gluttony
nodes.description:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

 Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health. 60 sec cooldown.

nodes.name: Soulburn
nodes.description:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

choices.name: Blight of Weakness
choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

choices.name: Blight of Tongues
choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

nodes.name: Agony
nodes.description:
Inflicts increasing agony on the target, causing up to 2,379 Shadow damage over 18 sec. Damage starts low and increases over the duration. Refreshing Agony maintains its current damage level.

Agony damage sometimes generates 1 Soul Shard.

nodes.name: Unstable Affliction
nodes.description:
Afflicts the target with 1,287 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

If dispelled, deals 14,850 damage to the dispeller and silences them for 4 sec. This damage is increased by 15% per stack on the target.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies while afflicted.

nodes.name: Seed of Corruption
nodes.description:
Embeds a demon seed in the enemy target that will explode after 10.7 sec, dealing 907 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards and applying Corruption to them. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

The seed will detonate early if the target is hit by other detonations, or takes 190 damage from your spells.

nodes.name: Nightfall
nodes.description:
Corruption damage has a chance to cause your next Shadow Bolt or Malefic Grasp to deal 25% increased damage. 

Shadow Bolt is instant cast and Malefic Grasp channels 50% faster when affected.

nodes.name: Haunt
nodes.description:
A ghostly soul haunts a single target, dealing 2,677 Shadow damage and increasing your damage dealt to the target by 12% for 18 sec.

 If the target dies, Haunt's cooldown is reset.

nodes.name: Shared Agony
nodes.description: Increases Agony damage by 10% and Agony now hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

choices.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
choices.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 15% and increases its damage by 40%.

choices.name: Drain Soul
choices.description:
Replaces Shadow Bolt.

Drains the target's soul, causing 2,117 Shadow damage over 4.5 sec.

Damage is increased by 100% against enemies below 20% health.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies during this effect.

nodes.name: Improved Haunt
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Haunt by 35% and reduces its cast time by 0.3 sec.

choices.name: Absolute Corruption
choices.description:
Corruption is now permanent and deals 15% increased damage.

Duration reduced to 24 sec against players.

choices.name: Siphon Life
choices.description: Corruption deals 30% increased damage and its periodic damage heals you for 5% of the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Cunning Cruelty
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul have a chance to trigger a Shadow Bolt Volley, dealing 488 Shadow damage to 5 enemies within 10 yards of your current target.

nodes.name: Withering Bolt
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul deal 5% increased damage, up to 15%, per damage over time effect you have active on the target.

nodes.name: Creeping Death
nodes.description: Your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction deal damage 10% faster.

nodes.name: Dark Harvest
nodes.description:
Consume the life force of each target afflicted by your damaging periodic effects, dealing 12,764 Shadowflame damage over 2.7 sec.

Damage dealt by Dark Harvest heals you for 50% of damage done.

nodes.name: Practiced Pestilence
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Summon Darkglare
nodes.description:
Summons a Darkglare from the Twisting Nether that increases the damage of your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 20% while active.

The Darkglare will serve you for 20 sec, blasting its target for 1,826 Shadow damage, increased by 10% for every damage over time effect you have active on their current target.

choices.name: Summoner's Embrace
choices.description: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by 3%.

choices.name: Grimoire of Sacrifice
choices.description:
Sacrifices your demon pet for power, gaining its command demon ability, and causing your spells to sometimes also deal 138 additional Shadow damage.

Lasts until canceled or until you summon a demon pet.

nodes.name: Cull the Weak
nodes.description: Casting Unstable Affliction or Seed of Corruption reduces the cooldown of Dark Harvest by 1.5 sec.

nodes.name: Malediction
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 5%.

nodes.name: Sudden Onset
nodes.description: Agony damage is increased by 10% and starts at 3 stacks.

nodes.name: Eye Contract
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Summon Darkglare by 5.0 sec.

nodes.name: Malefic Grasp
nodes.description:
While Darkglare is active, your Shadow Bolt becomes Malefic Grasp. 

 Malefic Grasp
Binds the target in twilight, dealing 4,003 Shadow damage over 3.6 sec.

When Malefic Grasp deals damage, it causes all of your other periodic Affliction damage effects to instantly deal 30% of their normal periodic damage.

nodes.name: Nether Plating
nodes.description:
Adorns your Darkglare with armor forged from within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. 

Eye Beam now jumps to up to 4 additional targets within 10 yards and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Sacrolash's Dark Strike
nodes.description: Corruption damage is increased by 15%, and each time it deals damage any of your Curses active on the target are extended by 0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Contagion
nodes.description: Increases critical strike damage dealt by Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 15%.

nodes.name: Shard Instability
nodes.description: Damage dealt by Shadow Bolt has a 20% chance to make your next Unstable Affliction cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

nodes.name: Niskaran Methods
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Agony and Corruption by 10%.

nodes.name: Potent Soul Shards
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Unstable Affliction and Seed of Corruption by 5%.

nodes.name: Nocturnal Yield
nodes.description: Increases Corruption damage by 10% and Nightfall additionally makes your next Seed of Corruption cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

nodes.name: Xavius' Gambit
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Unstable Affliction by 0.15 sec and increases its damage by 5%.

nodes.name: Ravenous Afflictions
nodes.description: Critical strikes from your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction have a chance to grant Nightfall.

nodes.name: Seeds of Destruction
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Seed of Corruption by 0.20 sec and increases its damage by 5%.

nodes.name: Fatal Echoes
nodes.description: When Unstable Affliction expires, it has a 10% chance to reapply itself.

nodes.name: Cascading Calamity
nodes.description: Casting Unstable Affliction on a target affected by your Unstable Affliction increases your Haste by 5% for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Death's Embrace
nodes.description: Agony, Corruption, Unstable Affliction, Seed of Corruption, and Shadow Bolt deal up to 40% increased damage on targets below 35% health. Damage increase is higher against lower health targets.

nodes.name: Patient Zero
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Seed of Corruption to its host by 50%.

nodes.name: Sow the Seeds
nodes.description: Seed of Corruption now embeds demon seeds into 2 additional nearby enemies at 50% effectiveness.

ranks.description:
Haunt now calls upon a demonic soul from within the Twisting Nether to haunt your target.

The soul is unstable and ravenous, dealing 2,474 Shadow damage to its host and 3 enemies within 10 yards suffering from your Corruption over its duration.
Increases the initial damage of Haunt by 50% and Haunt increases damage dealt to its host by an additional 2%.

Damage dealt by Haunt has a chance to release the demonic soul haunting its target. When released, it unleashes a devastating attack before being banished back to Nathreza.

 Wrath of Nathreza
Calls down a meteor formed from the ruins of Nathreza that explodes upon impact, dealing 6,401 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Wicked Reaping
nodes.description:
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.

Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal 914 Shadow damage to your target.

choices.name: Shared Fate
choices.description:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts 189 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 0.9 sec.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Feast of Souls
choices.description: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

choices.name: Eternal Servitude
choices.description: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

choices.name: Gorefiend's Resolve
choices.description: Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

nodes.name: Necrolyte Teachings
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Demoniac's Fervor
nodes.description: Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

nodes.name: Sataiel's Volition
nodes.description: Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.

nodes.name: Quietus
nodes.description:
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

nodes.name: Soul Anathema
nodes.description:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing 488 Shadow damage over 10 sec.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

choices.name: Gorebound Fortitude
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

choices.name: Friends In Dark Places
choices.description: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

nodes.name: Demonic Soul
nodes.description:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing 1,342 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Shadow of Death
nodes.description: Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 3 Soul Shards that each contain a Succulent Soul.

nodes.name: Eternal Hunger
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

nodes.name: Shared Vessel
nodes.description:
Increases your Mastery by 2%.

This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

nodes.name: Manifested Avarice
nodes.description:
Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec.

 Soul Swipe
Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing 742 Shadow damage to its target and 495 Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

choices.name: Curse of the Satyr
choices.description:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

 Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

choices.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
choices.description: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Seeds of Their Demise
nodes.description:
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals 378 Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.

nodes.name: Mark of Xavius
nodes.description:
Wither damage increased by 25%.

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

choices.name: Zevrim's Resilience
choices.description: Dark Pact heals you for 625 every 1 sec while active.

choices.name: Illhoof's Design
choices.description: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Blackened Soul
nodes.description:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 sec to deal 378 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

nodes.name: Wither
nodes.description:
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing 76 Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional 1,262 Shadowflame damage over 18 sec.

Replaces Corruption.

nodes.name: Malevolence
nodes.description:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 sec, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take 4,808 Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

nodes.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
nodes.description:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%. 

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

nodes.name: Xalan's Cruelty
nodes.description: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

nodes.name: Xalan's Ferocity
nodes.description: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

choices.name: Hatefury Rituals
choices.description: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

choices.name: Bleakheart Tactics
choices.description: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

nodes.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
nodes.description: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

nodes.name: Devil Fruit
nodes.description: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Through the Felvine
nodes.description:
Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 35% and Rain of Fire by 6%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

demonology.description: A commander of demons who twists the souls of their army into devastating power. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Soul Harvester
left.description: Few grasp the power hidden within souls, but many know the hunger demons share for spirits of the fallen. Soul Harvesters enter pacts with demons from the Twisting Nether, serving as their host and feeding them the souls of their foes in exchange for incredible power.

right.name: Diabolist
right.description: The defeat of the Legion left many powerful demons unbound. Diabolists command greater demons once thought to be uncontrollable and wield abyssal powers from the Twisting Nether on the battlefield.

choices.description: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Swift Artifice
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

nodes.name: Soul Link
nodes.description:
5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. 

While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Frequent Traveler
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

nodes.name: Fel Synergy
nodes.description: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

nodes.name: Oppressive Darkness
nodes.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

nodes.name: Pact of Gluttony
nodes.description:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

 Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health. 60 sec cooldown.

nodes.name: Soulburn
nodes.description:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

choices.name: Blight of Weakness
choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

choices.name: Blight of Tongues
choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

nodes.name: Hand of Gul'dan
nodes.description:
Calls down a demonic meteor full of Wild Imps which burst forth to attack the target.

Deals up to 577 Shadowflame damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summons 3 Wild Imps.

nodes.name: Demoniac
nodes.description:
Grants access to the following abilities:

 Demonbolt
Send the fiery soul of a fallen demon at the enemy, causing 1,524 Shadowflame damage.

 Demonic Core
When your Wild Imps fade or are imploded, you have a 10% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core. 

When your summoned Dreadstalkers fade away, you have a 100% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core.

Demonic Core reduces the cast time of Demonbolt by 100%. Maximum 4 stacks.

nodes.name: Call Dreadstalkers
nodes.description: Summons 2 ferocious Dreadstalkers to attack the target for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Dominant Hand
nodes.description: Increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan to its main target by 20%.

nodes.name: Fel Intellect
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 2%.

nodes.name: Practiced Rituals
nodes.description: Increases your Mastery by 2%.

nodes.name: Dreadlash
nodes.description: When your Dreadstalkers charge into battle, their Dreadbite attack now hits all targets within 8 yards and deals 10% more damage.

nodes.name: Imp-erator
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Wild Imp's Fel Firebolt by 15%.

choices.name: Implosion
choices.description: Demonic forces suck 6 of your Wild Imps toward the target, and then cause them to violently explode, dealing 508 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

choices.name: Power Siphon
choices.description: Instantly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.

nodes.name: Summon Felguard
nodes.description: Summons a Felguard under your command as a powerful melee combatant.

nodes.name: Infernal Rapidity
nodes.description: When your Wild Imps cast Fel Firebolt, they have 10% chance to instantly cast another Fel Firebolt at 200% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Rune of Shadows
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 10% and increases its damage by 15%.

nodes.name: Carnivorous Stalkers
nodes.description: Your Dreadstalkers' attacks have a 10% chance to trigger an additional Dreadbite.

nodes.name: Fel Armaments
nodes.description: The cooldown of your Felguard's Felstorm is reduced by 10 sec and damage dealt to your primary demon is reduced by 10%.

nodes.name: Imp Gang Boss
nodes.description: Hand of Gul'dan now empowers 1 of the Wild Imps it summons, increasing its damage dealt by 100%.

nodes.name: Demonic Brutality
nodes.description: Damaging critical strikes dealt by you and your demons deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Inner Demons
nodes.description: You passively summon a Wild Imp to fight for you every 12 sec.

nodes.name: Summon Demonic Tyrant
nodes.description:
Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 sec. 

Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active.

nodes.name: Blighted Maw
nodes.description: The fangs of your Dreadstalkers are coated in corrosive bile, causing Dreadbite to deal additional damage equal to 50% of damage dealt as Plague damage.

nodes.name: Improved Demonic Tactics
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your primary demon by 50% of your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Empowered Felstorm
nodes.description: Increases the damage of your Felguard's Felstorm by 20% and its duration by 4.0 sec.

nodes.name: Spiteful Reconstitution
nodes.description: Increases Demonbolt damage by 10% and consuming a Demonic Core has a chance to summon a Wild Imp.

nodes.name: Tyrant's Oblation
nodes.description: Your Demonic Tyrant also empowers you while active, increasing your haste by 8%.

nodes.name: Antoran Armaments
nodes.description:
Your Demonic Tyrant is equipped with armor forged within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. While summoned, your Demonic Tyrant now assaults enemies with powerful melee attacks.

 Burning Cleave
Cleaves all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting 362 Shadowflame damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Flametouched
nodes.description: Increases the attack speed of your Dreadstalkers by 10% and their critical strike chance by 15%.

nodes.name: Demonic Knowledge
nodes.description: Hand of Gul'dan has a 8% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.

nodes.name: Sacrificed Souls
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt and Demonbolt deal 2% additional damage per demon you have summoned.

nodes.name: Reign of Tyranny
nodes.description: Your Demonic Tyrant lasts an additional 5 sec and extends the duration of your Dreadstalkers by 15 sec when summoned.

nodes.name: Master Summoner
nodes.description: Increases Mastery by 3% and reduces the cast time of your Summon Demonic Tyrant and Summon Felguard by 0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Demonic Calling
nodes.description: Call Dreadstalkers costs 1 less Soul Shard and its cast time is reduced by 50%.

nodes.name: Doom
nodes.description:
When Demonbolt consumes a Demonic Core it inflicts impending doom upon the target, dealing 1,531 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds of its target after 20 sec or when removed. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hand of Gul'dan reduces the duration of Doom by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Hellbent Commander
nodes.description: Your demons deal 1.0% increased damage for each demon you control.

choices.name: Grimoire: Imp Lord
choices.description:
Summons an Imp Lord to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will remove 1 harmful effect from you when summoned. 

Transforms into Singe Magic while on cooldown.

choices.name: Grimoire: Fel Ravager
choices.description:
Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will purge 1 beneficial magic effect from an enemy.

Turns into Devour Magic while on cooldown.

nodes.name: Summon Vilefiend
nodes.description: Call Dreadstalkers also summons a Vilefiend that assists you in combat for 15 sec.

nodes.name: Summon Doomguard
nodes.description:
Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 sec. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 sec.

 Doom Bolt Volley
Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting 1,563 Shadow damage to each target.

nodes.name: To Hell and Back
nodes.description:
Power Siphon and Implosion summon 1 Imp Gang Boss for every 2 Wild Imps sacrificed. Wild Imps summoned this way gain Unstable Soul.

 Unstable Soul
Increases damage done by 50% and Fel Firebolt now jumps to 4 additional targets.

nodes.name: Stabilized Portals
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Summon Vilefiend, Grimoire: Imp Lord, and Grimoire: Fel Ravager by 3 sec.

choices.name: Mark of Shatug
choices.description:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Gloomhound and learns the following ability:

 Gloom Slash
Tooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional 120 Shadow damage.

choices.name: Mark of F'harg
choices.description:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Charhound and learns the following ability:

 Infernal Presence
Cloaked in the ever-burning flames of the abyss, dealing 60 Fire damage to enemies within 10 yards every 0.9 sec.

ranks.description: Summoning your Demonic Tyrant leaves open a portal to Argus for 15 sec, causing every 2 casts of Hand of Gul'dan to summon a subjugated demon that serves you for 10 sec.
Increases the duration of Dominion of Argus by 5 sec and increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan by 10%.

While Dominion of Argus is active, Hand of Gul'dan refunds 1 Soul Shard.

Demons summoned by Dominion of Argus last an additional 4 sec.

nodes.name: Wicked Reaping
nodes.description:
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.

Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal 914 Shadow damage to your target.

choices.name: Shared Fate
choices.description:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts 192 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 0.9 sec.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

choices.name: Feast of Souls
choices.description: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

choices.name: Eternal Servitude
choices.description: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

choices.name: Gorefiend's Resolve
choices.description: Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

nodes.name: Necrolyte Teachings
nodes.description: Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Demoniac's Fervor
nodes.description: Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

nodes.name: Sataiel's Volition
nodes.description: Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.

nodes.name: Quietus
nodes.description:
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

nodes.name: Soul Anathema
nodes.description:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing 488 Shadow damage over 10 sec.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

choices.name: Gorebound Fortitude
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

choices.name: Friends In Dark Places
choices.description: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

nodes.name: Demonic Soul
nodes.description:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing 1,342 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Shadow of Death
nodes.description: Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 3 Soul Shards that each contain a Succulent Soul.

nodes.name: Eternal Hunger
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

nodes.name: Shared Vessel
nodes.description:
Increases your Mastery by 2%.

This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

nodes.name: Manifested Avarice
nodes.description:
Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec.

 Soul Swipe
Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing 742 Shadow damage to its target and 495 Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

nodes.name: Secrets of the Coven
nodes.description:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt.

 Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing 5,119 Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

nodes.name: Ruination
nodes.description:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination.

 Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing 9,644 Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps.

Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Abyssal Dominion
nodes.description: Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.

nodes.name: Flames of Xoroth
nodes.description: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

choices.name: Soul-Etched Circles
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

choices.name: Annihilan's Bellow
choices.description: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

nodes.name: Gloom of Nathreza
nodes.description: Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells.

choices.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
choices.description: Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

choices.name: Infernal Machine
choices.description: Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

nodes.name: Cloven Souls
nodes.description: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5% for 15 sec.

choices.name: Infernal Vitality
choices.description: Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.

choices.name: Infernal Bulwark
choices.description: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Diabolic Ritual
nodes.description:
Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

nodes.name: Touch of Rancora
nodes.description:
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

nodes.name: Mind's Eyes
nodes.description: Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Looks That Kill
nodes.description:
Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active.

 Diabolic Gaze
Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing 304 Chaos damage.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

nodes.name: Diabolic Oculi
nodes.description:
You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells.

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing 891 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

destruction.description: A master of chaos who calls down fire to burn and demolish enemies. Preferred Weapon: Staff, Wand, Dagger, Sword

left.name: Hellcaller
left.description: Amongst the satyr sects throughout Azeroth, Hellcallers are the most feared. Hellcaller warlocks have learned to weave together the vilest of shadow magic and entropic fel fire at the cost of corrupting their own soul.

right.name: Diabolist
right.description: The defeat of the Legion left many powerful demons unbound. Diabolists command greater demons once thought to be uncontrollable and wield abyssal powers from the Twisting Nether on the battlefield.

nodes.name: Fel Domination
nodes.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

nodes.name: Soul Leech
nodes.description: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Burning Rush
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

nodes.name: Fel Pact
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Demon Skin
nodes.description:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.1% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

nodes.name: Fel Armor
nodes.description:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

nodes.name: Fiendish Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Demonic Embrace
nodes.description: Stamina increased by 10%.

choices.name: Nightmare
choices.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

choices.name: Horrify
choices.description: Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

nodes.name: Demonic Fortitude
nodes.description: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

nodes.name: Banish
nodes.description: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration, or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

nodes.name: Curse of Exhaustion
nodes.description:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

nodes.name: Curse of Tongues
nodes.description:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

nodes.name: Infernal Beneficiary
nodes.description: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Mortal Coil
nodes.description: Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 sec and healing you for 20% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Pact of the Annihilan
nodes.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

nodes.name: Demonic Circle
nodes.description:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects.

You also learn:

 Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

nodes.name: Pact of the Satyr
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 2%.

nodes.name: Improved Mortal Coil
nodes.description: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

nodes.name: Dark Pact
nodes.description: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional 950 for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

nodes.name: Foul Mouth
nodes.description: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

nodes.name: Empowered Healthstone
nodes.description: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

nodes.name: Abyss Walker
nodes.description: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Fortified Soul
nodes.description: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
nodes.description:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

nodes.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
nodes.description: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

choices.name: Ichor of Devils
choices.description: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

choices.name: Frequent Donor
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Pact of the Eredar
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.name: Pact of the Nathrezim
nodes.description: Increases your Leech by 2%.

nodes.name: Demonic Resilience
nodes.description: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

nodes.name: Empowered Drain Life
nodes.description: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

choices.name: Strength of Will
choices.description: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

choices.name: Dark Accord
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

nodes.name: Demonic Gateway
nodes.description: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

choices.name: Howl of Terror
choices.description: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

choices.name: Shadowfury
choices.description: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

 Demonic Healthstone

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

choices.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Chaos Bolt
nodes.description: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, dealing a critical strike for 3,161 Chaos damage. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Conflagrate
nodes.description:
Triggers an explosion on the target, dealing 1,363 Fire damage.

Generates 5 Soul Shard Fragments.

choices.name: Rain of Fire
choices.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire the target location, dealing 1,395 Fire damage over 7.1 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

choices.name: Rain of Fire
choices.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire upon your target, dealing 1,395 Fire damage over 7.1 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at your target.

nodes.name: Improved Conflagrate
nodes.description: Conflagrate gains an additional charge.

nodes.name: Backdraft
nodes.description: Conflagrate reduces the cast time of your next Incinerate, Chaos Bolt, or Soul Fire by 30%. Maximum 2 charges.

nodes.name: Practiced Chaos
nodes.description: Increases Mastery by 2%.

nodes.name: Roaring Blaze
nodes.description:
Increases Conflagrate damage by 10%. 

Conflagrate now erupts the target's Immolate, spreading it up to 3 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Explosive Potential
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Conflagrate by 2 sec.

choices.name: Mayhem
choices.description:
Your single target spells have a 35% chance to apply Havoc to a nearby enemy for 5.0 sec.

 Havoc
Marks a target with Havoc for 5.0 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for 60% of the damage dealt.

choices.name: Havoc
choices.description: Marks a target with Havoc for 15 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for 60% of the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Scalding Flames
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Immolate by 25% and its duration by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Shadowburn
nodes.description:
Blasts a target for 1,862 Shadowflame damage. Only usable on enemies that have less than 20% health.

Restores 1 Soul Shard and refunds a charge if the target dies within 5 sec.

nodes.name: Backlash
nodes.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

Physical attacks against you have a 20% chance to make your next Incinerate instant cast. This effect can only occur once every 6 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Havoc
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Havoc by 5 sec and increases the damage Havoc victims are dealt by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Ashen Remains
nodes.description: Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, and Incinerate deal 3% increased damage to targets afflicted by Immolate.

nodes.name: Cataclysm
nodes.description: Calls forth a cataclysm at the target location, dealing 1,388 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards and afflicting them with Immolate.

nodes.name: Fiendish Cruelty
nodes.description: Critical strikes dealt by Chaos Bolt, Conflagrate, or Incinerate have a 10% chance to make your next cast of Shadowburn within 30 sec cost no Soul Shards and usable on any target regardless of health.

nodes.name: Chaotic Inferno
nodes.description: Increases Chaos Bolt damage by 5% and Chaos Bolt now has a 25% chance to make your next Incinerate instant.

nodes.name: Flashpoint
nodes.description:
When your Immolate deals periodic damage to a target above 80% health, gain 2% Haste for 10 sec.

Stacks up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Summon Infernal
nodes.description:
Summons an Infernal from the Twisting Nether, impacting for 227 Fire damage and stunning all enemies in the area for 2 sec.

The Infernal will serve you for 30 sec, dealing 207 damage to all nearby enemies every 1.8 sec and generating 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec.

nodes.name: Emberstorm
nodes.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 2% and reduces the cast time of your Incinerate spell by 20%.

nodes.name: Fire and Brimstone
nodes.description: Incinerate now also hits all enemies near your target for 25% damage.

nodes.name: Lake of Fire
nodes.description:
Cataclysm now leaves behind a lake of fire that deals 2,281 Fire damage to enemies within it over 8.9 sec.

Immolate deals 20% increased damage to enemies within the lake of fire.

choices.name: Reverse Entropy
choices.description: Your spells have a chance to grant you 15% Haste for 8 sec.

choices.name: Internal Combustion
choices.description: Chaos Bolt consumes up to 5 sec of Immolate's damage over time effect on your target, instantly dealing that much damage.

choices.name: Crashing Chaos
choices.description: Summon Infernal increases the damage of your next 8 casts of Chaos Bolt by 25% or your next 8 casts of Rain of Fire by 35%.

choices.name: Rain of Chaos
choices.description: While your initial Infernal is active, every Soul Shard you spend has a 15% chance to summon an additional Infernal that lasts 8 sec.

choices.name: Summoner's Embrace
choices.description: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by 3%.

choices.name: Grimoire of Sacrifice
choices.description:
Sacrifices your demon pet for power, gaining its command demon ability, and causing your spells to sometimes also deal 142 additional Shadow damage.

Lasts until canceled or until you summon a demon pet.

nodes.name: Ruin
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike damage of your Destruction spells by 15%.

nodes.name: Improved Chaos Bolt
nodes.description: Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 10% and reduces its cast time by 0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Destructive Rapidity
nodes.description: Increases how quickly Rain of Fire deals damage by 25% and how quickly your Infernal's Immolation deals damage by 10%.

nodes.name: Devastation
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Destruction spells by 3%.

choices.name: Dimensional Rift
choices.description:
Chaos Bolt and Shadowburn have a 10% chance to rip open a hole in space and time, opening a random portal that damages your target:

Shadowy Tear
Deals 3,143 Shadow damage over 14 sec.

Unstable Tear
Deals 2,696 Chaos damage over 6 sec.

Chaos Tear
Fires a Chaos Bolt, dealing 1,240 Chaos damage. This Chaos Bolt always critically strikes and your critical strike chance increases its damage.

Generates 10 Soul Shard Fragments.

choices.name: Soul Fire
choices.description:
Burns the enemy's soul, dealing 10,249 Fire damage and applying Immolate.

Generates 1 Soul Shard.

nodes.name: Chaos Incarnate
nodes.description: Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, and Shadowburn always gain at least 70% of the maximum benefit from your Mastery: Chaotic Energies.

nodes.name: Conflagration of Chaos
nodes.description: Conflagrate and Shadowburn have a 100% chance to guarantee your next cast of either ability to critically strike, and increase its damage by your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Diabolic Embers
nodes.description: Incinerate now generates 100% additional Soul Shard Fragments.

choices.name: Demonfire Infusion
choices.description:
Periodic damage from Immolate has a 4% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

Incinerate has a 25% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

choices.name: Channel Demonfire
choices.description: Launches 15 bolts of felfire over 2.7 sec at random targets afflicted by your Immolate within 40 yds. Each bolt deals 149 Fire damage to the target and 74 Fire damage to nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Avatar of Destruction
nodes.description:
Casting Soul Fire summons an Overfiend.

Opening a Dimensional Rift has a chance to summon an Overfiend instead.

 Summon Overfiend
Generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec and casts Chaos Bolt at 80% effectiveness at its summoner's target. Lasts 8 sec.

nodes.name: Inferno
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Summon Infernal by 30.0 sec and increases your Mastery by 3%.

nodes.name: Alythess's Ire
nodes.description: Rain of Fire has a 20% chance to reduce the cost of your next Rain of Fire within 8 sec by 100%.

nodes.name: Raging Demonfire
nodes.description: Channel Demonfire fires an additional 2 bolts. Each bolt increases the remaining duration of Immolate on all targets hit by 0.5 sec.

ranks.description:
Casting Incinerate has a chance to evoke an echo of the Dark Titan's power.

 Echo of Sargeras
Hurl an ember torn from Nihilam at the target, dealing 712 Shadowflame damage and an additional 617 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Memories of the Titans' destruction flash in your mind when you evoke the Dark Titan's power, increasing critical strike by 4% and haste by 4% for 6 sec.

Casting Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, or Rain of Fire evokes an echo of the Dark Titan's power at 50%, 50%, or 60% effectiveness respectively.

If no target is found, a random target suffering from your Immolate will be selected.

choices.name: Curse of the Satyr
choices.description:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

 Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

choices.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
choices.description: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Seeds of Their Demise
nodes.description:
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals 378 Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.

nodes.name: Mark of Xavius
nodes.description:
Wither damage increased by 25%.

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

choices.name: Zevrim's Resilience
choices.description: Dark Pact heals you for 625 every 1 sec while active.

choices.name: Illhoof's Design
choices.description: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

nodes.name: Blackened Soul
nodes.description:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 sec to deal 378 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

nodes.name: Wither
nodes.description:
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing 75 Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional 1,239 Shadowflame damage over 18 sec.

Replaces Corruption.

nodes.name: Malevolence
nodes.description:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 sec, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take 4,808 Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

nodes.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
nodes.description:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%. 

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

nodes.name: Xalan's Cruelty
nodes.description: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

nodes.name: Xalan's Ferocity
nodes.description: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

choices.name: Hatefury Rituals
choices.description: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

choices.name: Bleakheart Tactics
choices.description: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

nodes.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
nodes.description: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

nodes.name: Devil Fruit
nodes.description: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Through the Felvine
nodes.description:
Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 35% and Rain of Fire by 6%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

nodes.name: Secrets of the Coven
nodes.description:
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt.

 Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing 5,119 Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

nodes.name: Ruination
nodes.description:
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination.

 Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing 9,644 Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps.

Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

nodes.name: Abyssal Dominion
nodes.description: Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.

nodes.name: Flames of Xoroth
nodes.description: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

choices.name: Soul-Etched Circles
choices.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

choices.name: Annihilan's Bellow
choices.description: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

nodes.name: Gloom of Nathreza
nodes.description: Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells.

choices.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
choices.description: Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

choices.name: Infernal Machine
choices.description: Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

nodes.name: Cloven Souls
nodes.description: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5% for 15 sec.

choices.name: Infernal Vitality
choices.description: Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.

choices.name: Infernal Bulwark
choices.description: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Diabolic Ritual
nodes.description:
Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

nodes.name: Touch of Rancora
nodes.description:
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

nodes.name: Mind's Eyes
nodes.description: Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Looks That Kill
nodes.description:
Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active.

 Diabolic Gaze
Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing 304 Chaos damage.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

nodes.name: Diabolic Oculi
nodes.description:
You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells.

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing 891 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
